reviews.review_title: the game is good, but control is bad
reviews.review_description: The game is good，including graphic , MR, vs CPU  which make it look cool. However, YOU need to control the star-ship like a drone with controller, which make the battle unplayable.  It is impossible to aim to  shoot enemy ship when they are moving fast. It is impossible to dodge the attack from enemy ship or chasing them because you control it like a drone.

reviews.review_title: Nice concept, but still long way to go :
reviews.review_description:
I got feedback from dev and I played again today. As they told me, ai added and I could play single game in multi match tab. Also maps are different each other but still, tutorial parts are not changed at all.
Anyway, I put some more stars for development team's effort. Thank you for your effort, Dev! I look forward to watch that you complete this game as perfect one :-)

reviews.review_title: Great start to a Spatial Asteroids
reviews.review_description: I love that this is mixed reality and I can see the asteroids floating in my room. You really have to think about the controls at first, but it does become second nature after a while. Multiplayer is fun, I just really wish there was more single player content. If they add that, I'll happily bump it up another star.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your lovely comment! We'll continue to work on additional SinglePlayer experiences. It's gonna be awesome!

reviews.review_description: 2 empty tutorials.  After that, nothing else.  I don't get it.  How to play solo and see the structures in the description ?

The game’s interface and visuals are well-designed and polished. However, the gameplay currently feels like a basic aerial combat experience where planes shoot at each other. The controls are not as intuitive as expected, possibly due to advanced features like rolls and flips, which seem tailored for experienced players. To improve accessibility, the game could offer a simpler control system—e.g., intuitive left/right turning and up/down movement—making it easier for casual players to enjoy. Adding cooperative gameplay elements, such as team-based enemy defense, could further enhance the experience. A promising game, but more refinement is needed!

Unfortunately this basically has no single player content, fun for 15mins if you would like to fly a drone around your room. Multiplayer seems to require real money, I'm not appreciating questionable mobile style monetisation practices showing up on Quest. 3 stars simply because of the sale price, could be fun if they focused on making a game rather than a monetisation framework.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for your feedback. Online multiplayer is unlimited and free to play now. Please make sure you have the latest version of the app.

reviews.review_description: The single player is 2 empty tutorials with minimal gameplay. There’s no way to even know what the main multiplayer game is like, as you can’t try it single-player, and there are no other players online. The fact that you have to purchase game currency to play the multiplayer game is ludicrous for an app that costs money. Feels like a con. Avoid.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for your feedback. Online multiplayer is unlimited and free to play now. Please make sure you have the latest version of the app. Enjoy! If this resolves your issue, we'd be really grateful if you could update your review so others can enjoy playing online.

reviews.review_description:
I had reviewed how like everyone else about the pay to win that the game was however the dev kindly explained himself and made changes. So that in itself show this unlike other games is a dev listening to the community. Refreshing! 

The game looks good, and well done. Multiplayer is lacking, assuming no one is playing yet. I did get one game in and it was fun. The movement was a little wonky to get a grasp on. 

This will be a fun addictive little game once more people start playing. 

This game is a beta status meaning it’s slowly evolving.  Supports this dev so he can finish this game and make more games!

reviews.review_title: The is game is something else!
reviews.review_description:
The controls are smooth, the gameplay is polished, and the graphics even in mixed reality is incredible! This game exceeded my expectations tenfold.  

Although I'm not a pilot of any sort, any will enjoy the controls of flying a ship within their home.

It is important to consumer that the developer actually listens to feedback.  The developer listened and reacted promptly.  The game design is actually fun and creative.  It had a little hiccup on launch but the developer addressed it right away.  Multiplayer with friends is fun.  It challenges your eye hand coordination.  It is a fun game esp in MR mode.

reviews.review_title: Working and Very improved! Keep playing
reviews.review_description: Ok new review! Very fun!!Game working better now, and it's fun! Spend some time and actually figure it out! Game is fun! Dev put work into making it better and I talk to him and more is to come! Awesome fun! Also check out my youtube channel as I posted a quick video. More to come as Game keeps rockin out the updates!!! https://youtube.com/@eagle069vrgaming?si=7urRZvKeo1OxS0IE   Actually here is the link to the video https://youtu.be/5gH8im50Eno?si=vuZ0EjlrGulqwPVo
I really like the gameplay in Ion Arcades. Flying the spaceship is pretty fun and feels smooth and intuitive. It's easy to create a lobby and jump into games with friends.

The controls are challenging at the start but then it clicks. I really had fun flying my own space ship after having my room transformed into space!

Give it a shot.
